name: Oil Change
description: Full synthetic or conventional oil change with filter replacement. Includes a complimentary 15-point inspection to keep your vehicle running smoothly.

name: Brake Inspection
description: Free comprehensive brake inspection covering pads, rotors, calipers, and brake fluid level. We provide a written report of findings at no charge.

name: Engine Diagnostics
description: Full OBD-II scan and engine diagnostic report. We identify the root cause of warning lights and performance issues with professional-grade equipment.

name: Tire Rotation
description: Rotate all four tires to ensure even wear and extend tire life. Includes tire pressure check and visual inspection of tread depth.

name: Brake Pad Replacement
description: Replace front or rear brake pads with quality parts. Includes rotor resurfacing check and brake fluid top-off for optimal stopping power.

name: Air Filter Replacement
description: Replace engine air filter to restore airflow and fuel efficiency. A clogged filter can reduce performance by up to 10%. Quick 15-minute service.

name: Battery Replacement
description: Test and replace your vehicle battery. Includes battery terminal cleaning, charging system check, and proper disposal of the old battery.

name: Wheel Alignment
description: Computer-assisted four-wheel alignment to restore proper steering angle. Prevents uneven tire wear and improves fuel economy and handling.

name: Coolant Flush
description: Drain and replace engine coolant to prevent overheating and corrosion. Includes radiator cap inspection and system pressure test.

name: Transmission Service
description: Drain and replace transmission fluid and filter. Keeps your transmission shifting smoothly and extends its service life significantly.

name: Spark Plug Replacement
description: Replace worn spark plugs to restore engine performance, fuel economy, and reliable starts. Includes ignition system visual inspection.

name: AC System Check
description: Inspect and test the air conditioning system including compressor, refrigerant level, and cabin filter. Keep cool all summer long.

name: Tire Balancing
description: Balance all four wheels using computerized equipment to eliminate vibration and ensure a smooth, safe ride at highway speeds.

name: Power Steering Flush
description: Replace old power steering fluid to maintain responsive, effortless steering. Prevents pump wear and potential leaks over time.

name: Alternator Replacement
description: Diagnose and replace a failing alternator to restore proper charging to your battery and electrical system. Includes post-installation system test.

name: Suspension Inspection
description: Full inspection of shocks, struts, ball joints, and tie rods. Poor suspension affects handling and tire wear — catch problems early.

name: Wiper Blade Replacement
description: Replace front and rear wiper blades for clear visibility in rain. Quick 10-minute service using quality all-season blades.
